title: setaria glauca var. aurea
intro: Setaria glauca var. aurea, also known as golden bristle grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to Africa and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of golden bristle grass include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and preventing infections, as well as promoting digestive health and relieving respiratory issues. Golden bristle grass is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or salve form for topical application.
